name: get_energy_consumption_overview
description: Retrieves a monthly energy consumption overview for a home, showing heating energy usage patterns, costs, and metrics for a specified month. Provides detailed consumption data including current month actual usage, previous month comparison, year-over-year comparison, and end-of-month forecasts. Allows users to view and track their historical energy consumption trends and analyze heating efficiency.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve energy consumption data

month.description: The month for which to retrieve consumption data, in YYYY-MM format (e.g., 2026-03)
